files.patch:
@@ -31,13 +31,16 @@ jobs: # Single top-level jobs key
         uses: actions/setup-node@v6
         with:
           node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
-          cache: 'npm'
+          cache: 'pnpm'
+          cache-dependency-path: pnpm-lock.yaml
+      - name: Enable pnpm
+        run: corepack enable pnpm
       - name: Install dependencies
-        run: npm ci
+        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
       - name: Build project
-        run: npm run build
+        run: pnpm run build
       - name: Run tests
-        run: npm test
+        run: pnpm test
 
   build: # Existing build job (preserved from original file)
     name: Build and Lint
@@ -52,15 +55,18 @@ jobs: # Single top-level jobs key
       uses: actions/setup-node@v6
       with:
         node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
-        cache: 'npm'
+        cache: 'pnpm'
+        cache-dependency-path: pnpm-lock.yaml
+    - name: Enable pnpm
+      run: corepack enable pnpm
     - name: Install dependencies
-      run: npm ci
+      run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
     - name: Lint
-      run: npm run lint
+      run: pnpm run lint
     - name: Build
-      run: npm run build
+      run: pnpm run build
     - name: Check TypeScript compilation
-      run: tsc --noEmit # Ensures type checking passes
+      run: pnpm exec tsc --noEmit # Ensures type checking passes
     - name: Upload build artifacts
       uses: actions/upload-artifact@v5
       with:
@@ -79,11 +85,14 @@ jobs: # Single top-level jobs key
         uses: actions/setup-node@v6
         with:
           node-version: '20.x' # Using a specific Node version for consistency
-          cache: 'npm'
+          cache: 'pnpm'
+          cache-dependency-path: pnpm-lock.yaml
+      - name: Enable pnpm
+        run: corepack enable pnpm
       - name: Install dependencies
-        run: npm ci
+        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
       - name: Validate Knowledge Base
-        run: npm run validate
+        run: pnpm run validate
       - name: Upload validation results
         if: always() # Always upload, even if validation fails, to see the report
         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v5

@@ -13,20 +13,25 @@ jobs:
         with:
           node-version: '20.x'
           registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org'
+          cache: 'pnpm'
+          cache-dependency-path: pnpm-lock.yaml
+
+      - name: Enable pnpm
+        run: corepack enable pnpm
       
       - name: Install dependencies
-        run: npm ci
+        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
       
       - name: Lint
-        run: npm run lint
+        run: pnpm run lint
       
       - name: Validate Knowledge Base
-        run: npm run validate-kb
+        run: pnpm run validate
       
       - name: Build
-        run: npm run build
+        run: pnpm run build
       
       - name: Publish
-        run: npm publish --access public
+        run: pnpm publish --access public
         env:
           NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}
